message:
feat(scanning): add Aho-Corasick pattern trigger scanner for terminal output (ft-2oph2)

Multi-pattern detection using Aho-Corasick automaton for error keywords,
warning indicators, completion markers, progress patterns, and test results.
Supports case-insensitive matching, locate mode with byte offsets, and
custom pattern sets. 20 unit tests covering all trigger categories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
